name: Duplicate resource assignment to workspace
description: TC-005-119/120: Adding the same team/environment to a workspace twice must return an error

steps.name: second assignment of the same team is rejected
REQUIRE: Request should complete without error
REQUIRE: Response should not be nil

parameters.name: Actual
